title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.076 - Audit of district, when — availability to public
text:
190.076.  Audit of district, when — availability to public. — Each ambulance district shall arrange for an audit of the records and accounts of the district at least every three years by a certified public accountant or firm of certified public accountants.  The audit shall be made available to the public on the district's website or otherwise freely available by other electronic means.
(L. 2025 H.B. 225 merged with S.B. 271)
